prompt.content:
Revise the RMBS / ONTO merger analysis in the model as follows:
1.	Update equity values of both companies to market capitalization at market close at 01/07/2026
2.	Change % SG&A Synergies to 70%
3.	Use TTM 2025 numbers
Calculate and output the following:
1.	Pro Forma Combined EV with Synergies
2.	Pro Forma Combined Equity Value
Round $ values to thousands with 0 decimal places.

rubrics.name: States the Pro Forma Combined EV with Synergies is $21,058,109 thousand... (ver_546c57ab03cf4a6e8109dc1c51e0bf33)

messages.content: States the Pro Forma Combined EV with Synergies is $21,058,109 thousand (acceptable range $20,847,528 to $21,268,690).

rubrics.name: States the Pro Forma Combined Equity Value is $21,730,064 thousand (acceptable... (ver_a38fcf5c57e046f2bd4c8fbbb720e091)

messages.content: States the Pro Forma Combined Equity Value is $21,730,064 thousand (acceptable range $21,512,763 to $21,947,365).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
